subject: refactor(debug): small tightenings — boot pill timeout constant, null-reason, env.url
body:
Four minor cleanups across the debug surface, no behaviour change in
the happy path.

- app/+html.tsx: extracted BOOT_PILL_TIMEOUT_MS (20_000) as a named
  TS constant interpolated into the inline IIFE template string, and
  derived the displayed label from it. Removes the hardcoded 20000 +
  '20s' drift risk; the comment now documents the must-exceed
  relationship with RECOVERY_TIMEOUT_MS.
- app/+html.tsx: unhandledrejection fallback now distinguishes
  null/undefined (→ 'Unhandled rejection') from other falsy values
  (0, '', false) which it stringifies as before. Previous `||`
  coalescing discarded the rare but-valid falsy rejection reasons.
- src/debug/debugLog.ts: env.url fallback now only calls redactUrls
  when there's a URL to redact, returning 'unknown' directly
  otherwise. Before: 'unknown' ran through the regex for no reason.
- app/_layout.tsx: added an explanatory comment on the side-effect
  require of debugRootMount so a reader doesn't mistake an unused
  return value for dead code.

Verified: tsc 0, jest 79/79, expo web build clean, IIFE visible in
built dist/index.html with the interpolated literals intact.

Tags: debug, refactor, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
Semver: patch
